login.title: Takiuru
login.subtitle: Ngā Raru Hōtaka Reo Māori mō te Wā o te GenAI

email.label: Wāhitau Īmēra
email.hint: Whakamahia tō īmēra mahi, kura rānei

login.redirectHint: He raruraru? Ka pai ake te aratau whakawhiti mō ngā hononga pōturi, ngā kaupapahere whatunga taumaha rānei.

errors.emailInUse: Kua whakamahia kē tēnei īmēra. Whakamātauria tētahi atu.
errors.weakPassword: He ngoikore rawa te kupuhipa. Whakamahia he kupuhipa kaha ake.
errors.internalError: I puta he hapa ā-roto. Whakamātauria anō ā muri atu.
errors.invalidCredential: Kāore i te tika tō kupuhipa.
errors.tooManyRequests: He nui rawa ngā tono takiuru. Whakamātauria anō ā muri atu.
errors.missingFields: Tēnā whakauruhia he īmēra me he kupuhipa.
errors.cookiesBlocked: E aukati ana tō pūtirotiro i ngā pihikete motuhēhē. Whakamahia te "Aratau Whakawhiti" i raro nei, whakatikahia rānei ō tautuhinga tūmataiti.
errors.popupTimeout: He pōturi te hononga. Whakamātauria te "Whakamahi Aratau Whakawhiti" i raro nei.
errors.popupBlocked: I aukatihia te matapihi pūkohu. Tukuna ngā matapihi pūkohu, whakamahia rānei te "Aratau Whakawhiti" i raro nei.
errors.networkError: I kitea he raruraru hononga whatunga. Whakamātauria te "Whakamahi Aratau Whakawhiti" i raro nei.
errors.unknown: I puta he hapa tē mōhiotia. Whakamātauria anō ā muri atu.

account.title: Tautuhinga Pūkete
account.languageDescription: Kōwhiria tō reo pai mō te atanga me ngā urupare AI
